message:
chore(.gitignore): ignore git_log*.txt / diffs*.txt agent scratch
dumps at repo root

Agents (both in interactive sessions and via `rch exec …`) routinely
dump git metadata to disk when triaging a repo — usually via one of:

    git log --oneline -20 > git_log.txt
    git log --oneline -100 > .git_log.txt
    git diff HEAD > diffs.txt
    rch exec -- 'git log --graph --oneline -20' > .git_log_rch_output.txt

…so they can grep the output without re-running the (slow) command.
None of these files are ever meant to ship, but they keep showing
up as untracked on `git status` between turns.

Ignore them narrowly and only at the repo root (leading `/`) so any
legitimate `git_log.txt` / `diffs.txt` inside `crates/**/tests/` or
`docs/` stays commitable:

* `/git_log*.txt`            (matches `git_log.txt`, `git_log_20260420.txt`)
* `/.git_log*.txt`           (matches `.git_log.txt`, `.git_log_rch_output.txt`)
* `/diffs*.txt`              (matches `diffs.txt`, `diffs2.txt`, `diffs_before.txt`)

Placed in the "Clippy output files" neighbourhood of .gitignore,
which is where the other agent-dumped *.log / *.out / *.out.* rules
already live, so the whole agent-scratch cluster stays in one
stretch of the file.

files.patch:
@@ -159,6 +159,12 @@ clippy.log
 clippy_output.*
 clippy_out.*
 
+# Agent-generated git-log / diff scratch dumps at repo root
+# (captured by agents for analysis; never meant to be tracked)
+/git_log*.txt
+/.git_log*.txt
+/diffs*.txt
+
 # SQLite memory-mode test DB files (leaked by in-memory URI tests)
 crates/mcp-agent-mail-db/file:*
